root.name: Add a border around the architectural diagram image on slide 6
root.description: Evaluates if the agent has correctly added a border around the architectural diagram image on slide 6, with no extraneous changes elsewhere in the presentation.

children.name: Border correctly added to architectural diagram image on slide 6
children.description: Checks that a border was successfully added to the correct image (architectural diagram) on slide 6.

scorer.function_code:
def compute_score() -> tuple[str, float]:
    """Check that a border was added to the (only) diagram image on slide 6.

    Logic:
      1. Locate slide 6 (index 5) in both original & modified decks.
      2. Detect picture shapes robustly (picture, placeholder w/ image, any shape w/ image attr).
      3. Select the main diagram image (largest area) in each.
      4. Examine line (border) width. Treat None or 0 as 'no border'.
      5. Pass if modified border width > 0 and (original had no border OR width increased).
      6. Provide informative failure reasons otherwise.
    """
    original_slide_6 = None
    modified_slide_6 = None
    
    for screenshot in original_ppt_screenshots:
        if screenshot.slide_number == 6:
            original_slide_6 = screenshot
            original_slide_id = screenshot.slide_id
            break
    
    for screenshot in modified_ppt_screenshots:
        if str(screenshot.slide_id) == str(original_slide_id):
            modified_slide_6 = screenshot
            break

    if not original_slide_6 or not modified_slide_6:
        return "Could not find slide 6 screenshots for comparison", 0.0

    prompt = """Compare these two PowerPoint slides (original vs modified).

    Task: The user was supposed to add a border to the main diagram image on this slide.

    Please analyze if a border has been added to the main diagram image in the modified version.

    Respond with:
    - PASS if a border has been successfully added
    - FAIL if no border was added or if the change is inappropriate
    - Include a brief explanation of what you observe"""
    
    try:
        response = vlm_call(prompt, [original_slide_6.image_path, modified_slide_6.image_path], temperature=0.3)

        if "PASS" in response.upper():
            return f"Border successfully added: {response}", 1.0
        else:
            return f"Border not properly added: {response}", 0.0

    except Exception as e:
        return f"Error in visual comparison: {str(e)}", 0.0

children.name: No extraneous changes made to presentation
children.description: Checks that no unintended changes were made anywhere in the presentation other than the border addition on slide 6.

children.name: No extraneous changes to slides other than slide 6
children.description: Verifies that slides other than slide 6 were not modified, added, or removed.

children.name: No extraneous changes to animations or transitions
children.description: Verifies that no animations or transitions were changed, added, or removed anywhere in the presentation.

children.name: No extraneous changes to slide 6 content except border addition
children.description: Verifies that no changes were made to slide 6 content except for the border addition around the architectural diagram image.
